name: California Cal Grant A
amount: Up to full tuition and fees at UC/CSU; tuition grant at private CA colleges

eligibility.citizenship: U.S. citizen, permanent resident, AB 540 student, or TPS holder; CA resident
eligibility.other_requirements: California resident; minimum 3.0 GPA; must file FAFSA or CA Dream Act Application; income and asset ceilings apply (SAR version or entitlement version)

stackable_notes: State grant; stacks with federal aid but some schools may reduce institutional grants. Check school packaging policies.
notes: Entitlement grant: all eligible HS seniors who file FAFSA/CADAA by deadline and meet GPA get this. Competitive version exists for others. The March 2 deadline is critical — late applications lose eligibility.
